arts.ttl: I have worked closely with Narcis Pelach and Stoke City should be very excited
arts.sum: Carlos Corberan is pleased to see that his former colleague Narcis Pelach has been granted an opportunity by Stoke City to manage a Championship club. "When I was working in Leeds I met him, because he was at Girona as an assistant coach - before that he'd been coaching Girona's second team.

arts.ttl: Narcis Pelach opens up on his biggest challenge at Stoke City, pressure and priorities
arts.sum: It has been challenging over the last two days to put things in place but to be honest we just the style of play we believe in so it’s not going to change. I try to work a little bit in each phase so that the team has a clear framework and know what we want to achieve in each moment.

arts.sum: Hull City head to the Bet365 Stadium on Friday evening to take on Stoke City in their latest… The post Palmer starts: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Stoke City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Narcis Pelach introduces new Stoke City coaching set-up as old boy returns
arts.sum: Paul Clements arrives with a growing reputation for his work developing goalkeepers, including Norwich's former Stoke loanee Angus Gunn, who credits the coach for helping him find the best form of his career. There was a theme as Narcis Pelach introduced the new staff who have arrived with him at Stoke City, with hard working and hungry the order of the day.

arts.ttl: Hull City ace reveals Tigers' desperation for Stoke City success
arts.sum: Walter's first summer signing, Cody Drameh, believes three points against Stoke City, even if it's a narrow 1-0 win courtesy of a Potters own goal, could ignite what has been a dismal campaign so far. Hull City will head to Staffordshire this evening looking to end a dismal run of form since Tim Walter took charge which has seen them fail to win any game under the German head coach.

arts.ttl: Inside Narcis Pelach's first Stoke press conference with transfer verdict
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach arrived at Stoke City two-and-a-half weeks after the summer transfer window had shut so it was interesting, as he talked about wanting to build a versatile team, to know if he then thought he had the tools at his disposal to do so. “No, I don’t want to ask for anything,” he said.
Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Jon Walters accepts pressure as he makes biggest call yet at Stoke City
arts.sum: Walters, who returned as sporting director in March, knows he will come under scrutiny and pressure to deliver after ending Steven Schumacher’s reign and giving Narcis Pelach his first chance as a head coach in the Championship. He said: "Ultimately it's not a nice thing in football, it's not an easy thing to do but it's my role to not sit on the fence and wait for things to peter out so you can make a decision with no pressure.

arts.ttl: Why key Hull City transfer deadline day deal came as a 'surprise'
arts.sum: "It was a little bit of a surprise, but Mark Robins clearly backs the other players that he's got," Goodman told Betway. Palmer, who came off the bench to make his Tigers debut in the second half of the defeat at Leeds United prior to the international break, and then came off the bench to have a positive impact against Sheffield United on Friday night, was in the final year of his contract at the CBS Arena and discussions over an extension to the deal he signed in 2022 had made little progress.
